title: Goten CLI Configuration
description: Configuration for the goten CLI. Drives `goten generate`, which emits ORM model definitions (e.g. GORM structs) from the core schema plus the active plugins' schema. Apply them with your ORM (e.g. db.AutoMigrate(authmodels.AllModels()...)).

plugins.description: Active plugin shorthand names whose schema is merged into the generated models. Each name must be registered with the CLI (run `goten generate` with an unknown name to see the available list).

output_dir.description: Directory the generated model file (auth_models.go) is written to.

package.description: Go package name for the generated file.

orm.description: Target ORM generator. Only gorm is supported currently.
